read is used for search output files with a single query and returns a QueryResult object
parse is used for search output files with multiple queries and returns a generator that yields QueryResult objects

SearchIO.QueryResult对象
...

QueryResult对象
...

from Bio import SearchIO
blast_qresult = SearchIO.read("my_blast.xml", "blast-xml")
blast_qresult
# QueryResult(id='42291', 100 hits)
print(blast_qresult)
# Program: blastn (2.2.27+)
  # Query: 42291 (61)
         # mystery_seq
 # Target: refseq_rna
   # Hits: ----  -----  ----------------------------------------------------------
            #  # HSP  ID + description
         # ----  -----  ----------------------------------------------------------
            # 0      1  gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1|  Homo sapiens microRNA 52...
            # 1      1  gi|301171311|ref|NR_035856.1|  Pan troglodytes microRNA...
            # 2      1  gi|270133242|ref|NR_032573.1|  Macaca mulatta microRNA ...
           # ~~~
           # 99      1  gi|397513516|ref|XM_003827011.1|  PREDICTED: Pan panisc...
  • Query ID: 42291
  • 61: mystery_seq is 61 nucleotides long
  • refseq_rna: The target database to search against refseq_rna

Hit对象
...

blast_hits = list(blast_qresult)
blast_hits
# [Hit(id='gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1|', query_id='42291', 1 hsps),
 # Hit(id='gi|301171311|ref|NR_035856.1|', query_id='42291', 1 hsps),
 # Hit(id='gi|270133242|ref|NR_032573.1|', query_id='42291', 1 hsps),
 # ...
 # Hit(id='gi|397513516|ref|XM_003827011.1|', query_id='42291', 1 hsps)]

blast_hit = blast_hits[0]
# Hit(id='gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1|', query_id='42291', 1 hsps)

blast_hit
# Hit(id='gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1|', query_id='42291', 1 hsps)

print(blast_hit)
# Query: 42291
       # mystery_seq
  # Hit: gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1| (61)
       # Homo sapiens microRNA 520b (MIR520B), microRNA
 # HSPs: ----  --------  ---------  ------  ---------------  ---------------------
          #   E-value  Bit score    Span      Query range              Hit range
       # ----  --------  ---------  ------  ---------------  ---------------------
          # 0   4.9e-23     111.29      61           [0:61]                 [0:61]

HSP对象
...

hsps = blast_hit.hsps
hsps
# [HSP(hit_id='gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1|', query_id='42291', 1 fragments)]

hsp = hsps[0]
hsp
# HSP(hit_id='gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1|', query_id='42291', 1 fragments)
print(hsp)
      # Query: 42291 mystery_seq
        # Hit: gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1| Homo sapiens microRNA 520b (MIR520...
# Query range: [0:61] (1)
  # Hit range: [0:61] (1)
# Quick stats: evalue 4.9e-23; bitscore 111.29
  # Fragments: 1 (61 columns)
     # Query - CCCTCTACAGGGAAGCGCTTTCTGTTGTCTGAAAGAAAAGAAAGTGCTTCCTTTTAGAGGG
             # |||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||
       # Hit - CCCTCTACAGGGAAGCGCTTTCTGTTGTCTGAAAGAAAAGAAAGTGCTTCCTTTTAGAGGG

HSPFragment对象
...

hspfragments = hsp.fragments
# [HSPFragment(hit_id='gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1|', query_id='42291', 61 columns)]

hspfragment = hspfragments[0]
hspfragment
# HSPFragment(hit_id='gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1|', query_id='42291', 61 columns)
print(hspfragment)
      # Query: 42291 mystery_seq
        # Hit: gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1| Homo sapiens microRNA 520b (MIR520...
# Query range: [0:61] (1)
  # Hit range: [0:61] (1)
  # Fragments: 1 (61 columns)
     # Query - CCCTCTACAGGGAAGCGCTTTCTGTTGTCTGAAAGAAAAGAAAGTGCTTCCTTTTAGAGGG
             # |||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||
       # Hit - CCCTCTACAGGGAAGCGCTTTCTGTTGTCTGAAAGAAAAGAAAGTGCTTCCTTTTAGAGGG

multipleseqalignment = hspfragment.aln
# <<class 'Bio.Align.MultipleSeqAlignment'> instance (2 records of length 61) at 24a19d7e9b0>

multipleseqalignment_list = list(hspfragment.aln)
# [SeqRecord(seq=Seq('CCCTCTACAGGGAAGCGCTTTCTGTTGTCTGAAAGAAAAGAAAGTGCTTCCTTT...GGG'), id='42291', name='aligned query sequence', description='mystery_seq', dbxrefs=[]),
 # SeqRecord(seq=Seq('CCCTCTACAGGGAAGCGCTTTCTGTTGTCTGAAAGAAAAGAAAGTGCTTCCTTT...GGG'), id='gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1|', name='aligned hit sequence', description='Homo sapiens microRNA 520b (MIR520B), microRNA', dbxrefs=[])]

multipleseqalignment_list[1]
# SeqRecord(seq=Seq('CCCTCTACAGGGAAGCGCTTTCTGTTGTCTGAAAGAAAAGAAAGTGCTTCCTTT...GGG'), id='42291', name='aligned query sequence', description='mystery_seq', dbxrefs=[]

BLAT的QueryResult对象
...

blat_qresult = SearchIO.read("my_blat.psl", "blat-psl")
print(blat_qresult)
# Program: blat (<unknown version>)
  # Query: mystery_seq (61)
         # <unknown description>
 # Target: <unknown target>
   # Hits: ----  -----  ----------------------------------------------------------
            #  # HSP  ID + description
         # ----  -----  ----------------------------------------------------------
            # 0     17  chr19  <unknown description>
  • BLAT的Bio.SearchIO的分析结果默认的程序version为 <unknown version>
  • BLAT的Query信息和BLAST不同,
  • Target database是<unknown target>, 因为BLAT的psl文件不包含该信息
  • Hits结果不同

QueryResult,Hit, HSP, HSPFragment对象的所有属性和方法
...

# QueryResult对象的属性和方法
print(dir(blast_qresult))
# ['absorb', 'append', 'blast_id', 'description', 'fragments', 'hit_filter', 'hit_keys', 'hit_map', 'hits', 'hsp_filter', 'hsp_map', 'hsps', 'id', 'index', 'items', 'iterhit_keys', 'iterhits', 'iteritems', 'param_evalue_threshold', 'param_filter', 'param_gap_extend', 'param_gap_open', 'param_score_match', 'param_score_mismatch', 'pop', 'program', 'reference', 'seq_len', 'sort', 'stat_db_len', 'stat_db_num', 'stat_eff_space', 'stat_entropy', 'stat_hsp_len', 'stat_kappa', 'stat_lambda', 'target', 'version']

# Hit对象的属性和方法
print(dir(hit))
# ['accession', 'append', 'attributes', 'blast_id', 'dbxrefs', 'description', 'description_all', 'filter', 'fragments', 'hsps', 'id', 'id_all', 'index', 'map', 'pop', 'query_description', 'query_id', 'seq_len', 'sort']

# HSP对象的属性和方法
print(dir(hsp))   # 也可以使用blast_qresult[0][0]
# ['aln', 'aln_all', 'aln_annotation', 'aln_annotation_all', 'aln_span', 'bitscore', 'bitscore_raw', 'evalue', 'fragment', 'fragments', 'gap_num', 'hit', 'hit_all', 'hit_description', 'hit_end', 'hit_end_all', 'hit_features', 'hit_features_all', 'hit_frame', 'hit_frame_all', 'hit_id', 'hit_inter_ranges', 'hit_inter_spans', 'hit_range', 'hit_range_all', 'hit_span', 'hit_span_all', 'hit_start', 'hit_start_all', 'hit_strand', 'hit_strand_all', 'ident_num', 'is_fragmented', 'molecule_type', 'output_index', 'pos_num', 'query', 'query_all', 'query_description', 'query_end', 'query_end_all', 'query_features', 'query_features_all', 'query_frame', 'query_frame_all', 'query_id', 'query_inter_ranges', 'query_inter_spans', 'query_range', 'query_range_all', 'query_span', 'query_span_all', 'query_start', 'query_start_all', 'query_strand', 'query_strand_all']

# HSPFragment对象的属性和方法
print(dir(hspfragment))
# ['aln', 'aln_annotation', 'aln_span', 'hit', 'hit_description', 'hit_end', 'hit_features', 'hit_frame', 'hit_id', 'hit_range', 'hit_span', 'hit_start', 'hit_strand', 'molecule_type', 'query', 'query_description', 'query_end', 'query_features', 'query_frame', 'query_id', 'query_range', 'query_span', 'query_start', 'query_strand']

HSPFragment对象的aln属性返回Bio.Align.MultipleSeqAlignment对象

QueryResult对象的hits属性和hit_keys属性
...

blast_qresult.hits    # hits属性储存Hit列表
# [Hit(id='gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1|', query_id='42291', 1 hsps),
 # Hit(id='gi|301171311|ref|NR_035856.1|', query_id='42291', 1 hsps),
 # Hit(id='gi|270133242|ref|NR_032573.1|', query_id='42291', 1 hsps),
 # ...]
blast_qresult.hit_keys    # hit_keys属性获取Hit键列表
# ['gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1|',
 # 'gi|301171311|ref|NR_035856.1|',
 # 'gi|270133242|ref|NR_032573.1|',
 # ...]

in操作, QueryResult对象类似字典
...

"gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1|" in blast_qresult
# True
"gi|262205317|ref|NR_030194.1|" in blast_qresult
# False

# 相当于打印信息中的 #列的信息
blast_qresult.index("gi|301171437|ref|NR_035870.1|")
# 22

QueryResult.sort方法
...

对Hit排序, key的函数作用于每个Hit对象
in_place是否就地排序

sorted_qresult = blast_qresult.sort(key=lambda hit: hit.seq_len, reverse=True, in_place=False)
for hit in sorted_qresult[:5]:
    print("%s %i" % (hit.id, hit.seq_len))

QueryResult.hit_filter方法
...

对QueryResult的hit进行筛选

len(blast_qresult)  # no. of hits before filtering
# 100
filtered_qresult = blast_qresult.hit_filter(func=lambda hit: len(hit.hsps) > 1)
len(filtered_qresult)  # no. of hits after filtering
# 37

QueryResult.hit_map方法
...

类似于pandas的apply方法, 对Hit对象进行运用func函数

def map_func(hit):
    # renames "gi|301171322|ref|NR_035857.1|" to "NR_035857.1"
    hit.id = hit.id.split("|")[3]
    return hit

mapped_qresult = blast_qresult.hit_map(func=map_func)
mapped_qresult.hit_keys
# ['NR_030195.1',
 # 'NR_035856.1',
 # ...]

Hit结果解释
...

blast_qresult[3]
# Hit(id='gi|301171322|ref|NR_035857.1|', query_id='42291', 2 hsps)
print(blast_qresult[3])
# Query: 42291
       # mystery_seq
  # Hit: gi|301171322|ref|NR_035857.1| (86)
       # Pan troglodytes microRNA mir-520c (MIR520C), microRNA
 # HSPs: ----  --------  ---------  ------  ---------------  ---------------------
          #   E-value  Bit score    Span      Query range              Hit range
       # ----  --------  ---------  ------  ---------------  ---------------------
          # 0   8.9e-20     100.47      60           [1:61]                [13:73]
          # 1   3.3e-06      55.39      60           [0:60]                [13:73]

Bit score 是一种评估 BLAST 搜索结果相似性的度量。它是基于搜索的实际得分计算出来的，并对长度、搜索空间和替代矩阵等进行了调整。Bit score 被设计成一种独立于数据库大小和查询序列长度的度量，因此可以用于比较不同的搜索结果。

在 BLAST 的输出中，Bit score 通常更受欢迎而不是原始得分，因为 Bit score 提供了一个更通用、更稳健的相似性衡量方法。

Bit score 的计算公式为：
"Pasted image 20231003111856.png" is not created yet. Click to create.
其中 S 是原始得分，λ 和 K 是与所使用的打分矩阵相关的常数。

值得注意的是，Bit score 与 E-value 不同。E-value 是一个预测与随机序列达到给定得分的期望匹配次数。Bit score 则是表示相似性的度量。通常，Bit score 越高，对应的 E-value 也越低，意味着结果越可信。

  • E-value (Expectation value):
    • E-value 量化了在随机对齐下观察到给定对齐得分或更好得分的概率。它基于 BLAST 搜索的特定参数（如数据库大小和查询长度）来计算。
    • 一个较小的 E-value 意味着对齐是显著的。例如，E-value 为 1×10^−3 表示在随机条件下，你预期会有 0.001 个与当前得分同样好或更好的对齐。
    • 通常，一个较小的 E-value（如小于 1×10−31×10−3 或更小）被认为是显著的，但具体的阈值可能会根据应用或数据集的特性而变化。
  • Bit score:
    • Bit score 是对齐得分的归一化版本，它考虑了使用的打分矩阵和隙值开放/扩展的罚分。通过归一化，Bit score 允许对不同参数和不同的 BLAST 搜索进行比较。
    • 一个较高的 Bit score 表示对齐的质量较好。
  • Span: 表示 High-scoring Segment Pair (HSP) 覆盖的总长度。它是查询序列和目标序列在该 HSP 中匹配、不匹配和存在间隔的总长度。基本上，它是两个序列在此 HSP 中的对齐长度。
  • Query range: 表示"查询序列"中的开始和结束位置，其中与目标序列的某个部分发生了对齐（即该 HSP）。例如，[1:61] 表示查询序列的第 1 到第 61 的核酸或氨基酸与目标序列的某个部分发生了对齐。
  • Hit range: 这表示"目标序列"中的开始和结束位置，与查询序列的某个部分发生了对齐。例如，[13:73] 表示目标序列的第 13 到第 73 的核酸或氨基酸与查询序列的某个部分发生了对齐。

Bit score 直接反映了序列对齐的得分，而 E-value 则为这个得分提供了一个统计上的显著性评估。在比较来自不同搜索或不同打分参数的对齐时，Bit score 更有用。而在评估单个对齐的显著性时，E-value 更有意义。

Hit, HSP, HSPFragment是什么
...

  • Hit
    在BLAST中，当我们谈到"hit"时，我们通常指的是数据库中与查询序列具有一定相似性的序列。换句话说，每个"hit"代表了数据库中"一个"与查询序列产生了有意义对齐的序列。简单地说，当你使用一个序列（我们称之为“查询序列”）来搜索一个数据库（例如GenBank、RefSeq等），BLAST会返回一系列与你的查询序列相似的序列。这些返回的序列就是所谓的"hits"。
  • HSP
    每个hit可能包含一个或多个High-scoring Segment Pairs (HSPs)。HSPs是查询序列和数据库中的序列之间的局部对齐，这些对齐的得分超过了预先设定的阈值。
  • HSPFragment
    当 BLAST 对齐涉及到一个复杂的情况，例如一个查询序列对齐到目标序列的多个不连续的片段（这在蛋白质结构域或由于基因重排而断裂的序列中是常见的），HSPFragment 就会被用来表示每个独立的、连续的对齐片段。每个 HSPFragment 包含其自身的查询和目标序列范围、对齐序列以及其他相关信息。

一个人类基因数据库中使用一个已知的人类基因序列进行BLAST搜索。你可能会得到以下结果：

  1. 一个与你的查询序列完全匹配的hit（这可能就是你查询的那个基因）。
  2. 一些与你的查询序列非常相似，但不完全相同的hits（这些可能是你查询基因的不同变种或近似的基因）。
  3. 更多的hits，与查询序列相似性较低，但仍然有足够的相似性被视为有意义的。

这些hits提供了与查询序列在进化上、功能上或结构上可能相关的信息，可以进一步用于分析。

BLAT的Hit结果
...

blat_qresult = SearchIO.read("my_blat.psl", "blat-psl")
print(blat_qresult.hits[0])
# Query: mystery_seq
       # <unknown description>
  # Hit: chr19 (59128983)
       # <unknown description>
 # HSPs: ----  --------  ---------  ------  ---------------  ---------------------
          #   E-value  Bit score    Span      Query range              Hit range
       # ----  --------  ---------  ------  ---------------  ---------------------
          # 0         ?          ?       ?           [0:61]    [54204480:54204541]
          # 1         ?          ?       ?           [0:61]    [54233104:54264463]
          # 2         ?          ?       ?           [0:61]    [54254477:54260071]
          # 3         ?          ?       ?           [1:61]    [54210720:54210780]
          # 4         ?          ?       ?           [0:60]    [54198476:54198536]
          # 5         ?          ?       ?           [0:61]    [54265610:54265671]
          # 6         ?          ?       ?           [0:61]    [54238143:54240175]
          # 7         ?          ?       ?           [0:60]    [54189735:54189795]
          # 8         ?          ?       ?           [0:61]    [54185425:54185486]
          # 9         ?          ?       ?           [0:60]    [54197657:54197717]
         # 10         ?          ?       ?           [0:61]    [54255662:54255723]
         # 11         ?          ?       ?           [0:61]    [54201651:54201712]
         # 12         ?          ?       ?           [8:60]    [54206009:54206061]
         # 13         ?          ?       ?          [10:61]    [54178987:54179038]

BLAT Hit的打印输出有 Query range, Hit range
因为, BLAT的目的在于快速找到目标序列在基因组上的位置。

HSP结果解释
...

print(blast_qresult[0][0])
      # Query: 42291 mystery_seq
        # Hit: gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1| Homo sapiens microRNA 520b (MIR520...
# Query range: [0:61] (1)
  # Hit range: [0:61] (1)
# Quick stats: evalue 4.9e-23; bitscore 111.29
  # Fragments: 1 (61 columns)
     # Query - CCCTCTACAGGGAAGCGCTTTCTGTTGTCTGAAAGAAAAGAAAGTGCTTCCTTTTAGAGGG
             # |||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||
       # Hit - CCCTCTACAGGGAAGCGCTTTCTGTTGTCTGAAAGAAAAGAAAGTGCTTCCTTTTAGAGGG

打印HSP对象可以查看详细信息包括:

  • Query IDs and descriptions, Hit IDs and descriptions
  • Query range, Hit range
  • E-value, bit score
  • Fragment number and length
  • query and hit sequence alignment

HSP属性
...

blast_hsp = blast_qresult[0][0]
blast_hsp.query_range
# (0, 61)
blast_hsp.evalue
# 4.91307e-23
blast_hsp.hit_start  # start coordinate of the hit sequence
# 0
blast_hsp.query_span  # how many residues in the query sequence
# 61
blast_hsp.aln_span  # how long the alignment is
# 61
blast_hsp.query
# SeqRecord(seq=Seq('CCCTCTACAGGGAAGCGCTTTCTGTTGTCTGAAAGAAAAGAAAGTGCTTCCTTT...GGG'), id='42291', name='aligned query sequence', description='mystery_seq', dbxrefs=[])
blast_hsp.hit   # hsp的目标序列
# SeqRecord(seq=Seq('CCCTCTACAGGGAAGCGCTTTCTGTTGTCTGAAAGAAAAGAAAGTGCTTCCTTT...GGG'), id='gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1|', name='aligned hit sequence', description='Homo sapiens microRNA 520b (MIR520B), microRNA', dbxrefs=[])
blast_hsp.aln
# <<class 'Bio.Align.MultipleSeqAlignment'> instance (2 records of length 61) at 17f8e4f73a0>

Hsp和HspFragquery对象的query属性和hit属性
...

  • query属性指代已知序列或被检索序列
  • hit属性指代的是hsp的目标序列, 属于SeqRecord对线, 而不是Hit对象
blast_hsp.hit
# SeqRecord(seq=Seq('CCCTCTACAGGGAAGCGCTTTCTGTTGTCTGAAAGAAAAGAAAGTGCTTCCTTT...GGG'), id='gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1|', name='aligned hit sequence', description='Homo sapiens microRNA 520b (MIR520B), microRNA', dbxrefs=[])
hspfragment.hit
# SeqRecord(seq=Seq('CCCTCTACAGGGAAGCGCTTTCTGTTGTCTGAAAGAAAAGAAAGTGCTTCCTTT...GGG'), id='gi|262205317|ref|NR_030195.1|', name='aligned hit sequence', description='Homo sapiens microRNA 520b (MIR520B), microRNA', dbxrefs=[])

blast_hsp.query
# SeqRecord(seq=Seq('CCCTCTACAGGGAAGCGCTTTCTGTTGTCTGAAAGAAAAGAAAGTGCTTCCTTT...GGG'), id='42291', name='aligned query sequence', description='mystery_seq', dbxrefs=[])
hspfragment.query
# SeqRecord(seq=Seq('CCCTCTACAGGGAAGCGCTTTCTGTTGTCTGAAAGAAAAGAAAGTGCTTCCTTT...GGG'), id='42291', name='aligned query sequence', description='mystery_seq', dbxrefs=[])

blat_hsp.query_span  # length of query match
# 61
blat_hsp.hit_span  # length of hit match
# 61

NCBI’s Entrez databases
...

有2种访问途径

  • Search NCBI databases - NLM (nih.gov)
  • Bio.Entrez模块
from Bio import Entrez
Entrez.email = "xujialiuphd@gmail.com"
Entrez.api_key = "c7fd5c74cfe7e674bf3f78b94af0fb1fa909"

Entrez.einfo()函数
...

用于获取关于NCBI Entrez数据库的信息
HTTPResponse对象的read方法
返回xml格式二进制文本

handle = Entrez.einfo()
# <http.client.HTTPResponse object at 0x0000024A1A4F2830>
result = handle.read()
print(result)
# b'<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>\n<!DOCTYPE eInfoResult PUBLIC "-//NLM//DTD einfo 20190110//EN" "[https://eutils.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/eutils/dtd/20190110/einfo.dtd](https://eutils.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/eutils/dtd/20190110/einfo.dtd)">\n<eInfoResult>\n<DbList>\n\n\t<DbName>pubmed</DbName>\n\t<DbName>protein</DbName>\n\t<DbName>nuccore</DbName>\n\t<DbName>ipg</DbName>\n\t<DbName>nucleotide</DbName>\n\t<DbName>structure</DbName>\n\t<DbName>genome</DbName>\n\t<DbName>annotinfo</DbName>\n\t<DbName>assembly</DbName>\n\t<DbName>bioproject</DbName>\n\t<DbName>biosample</DbName>\n\t<DbName>blastdbinfo</DbName>\n\t<DbName>books</DbName>\n\t<DbName>cdd</DbName>\n\t<DbName>clinvar</DbName>\n\t<DbName>gap</DbName>\n\t<DbName>gapplus</DbName>\n\t<DbName>grasp</DbName>\n\t<DbName>dbvar</DbName>\n\t<DbName>gene</DbName>\n\t<DbName>gds</DbName>\n\t<DbName>geoprofiles</DbName>\n\t<DbName>homologene</DbName>\n\t<DbName>medgen</DbName>\n\t<DbName>mesh</DbName>\n\t<DbName>nlmcatalog</DbName>\n\t<DbName>omim</DbName>\n\t<DbName>orgtrack</DbName>\n\t<DbName>pmc</DbName>\n\t<DbName>popset</DbName>\n\t<DbName>proteinclusters</DbName>\n\t<DbName>pcassay</DbName>\n\t<DbName>protfam</DbName>\n\t<DbName>pccompound</DbName>\n\t<DbName>pcsubstance</DbName>\n\t<DbName>seqannot</DbName>\n\t<DbName>snp</DbName>\n\t<DbName>sra</DbName>\n\t<DbName>taxonomy</DbName>\n\t<DbName>biocollections</DbName>\n\t<DbName>gtr</DbName>\n</DbList>\n\n</eInfoResult>\n'
handle.close()

Entrez.read()函数
...

返回字典

handle = Entrez.einfo()
record = Entrez.read(handle)
record
# {'DbList': ['pubmed', 'protein', 'nuccore', 'ipg', 'nucleotide', 'structure', 'genome', 'annotinfo', 'assembly', 'bioproject', 'biosample', 'blastdbinfo', 'books', 'cdd', 'clinvar', 'gap', 'gapplus', 'grasp', 'dbvar', 'gene', 'gds', 'geoprofiles', 'homologene', 'medgen', 'mesh', 'nlmcatalog', 'omim', 'orgtrack', 'pmc', 'popset', 'proteinclusters', 'pcassay', 'protfam', 'pccompound', 'pcsubstance', 'seqannot', 'snp', 'sra', 'taxonomy', 'biocollections', 'gtr']}
record.keys()
# dict_keys(['DbList'])
record["DbList"]
# ['pubmed', 'protein', 'nuccore', 'ipg', 'nucleotide', 'structure', 'genome', 'annotinfo', 'assembly', 'bioproject', 'biosample', 'blastdbinfo', 'books', 'cdd', 'clinvar', 'gap', 'gapplus', 'grasp', 'dbvar', 'gene', 'gds', 'geoprofiles', 'homologene', 'medgen', 'mesh', 'nlmcatalog', 'omim', 'orgtrack', 'pmc', 'popset', 'proteinclusters', 'pcassay', 'protfam', 'pccompound', 'pcsubstance', 'seqannot', 'snp', 'sra', 'taxonomy', 'biocollections', 'gtr']

handle = Entrez.einfo(db="pubmed")
record = Entrez.read(handle)
record.keys()    # 如果有参数, 返回dict_keys为DbInfo而不是DbList
# dict_keys(['DbInfo'])
record["DbInfo"]["Description"]
# 'PubMed bibliographic record'
record["DbInfo"]["Count"]
# '36286890'
record["DbInfo"]["LastUpdate"]
# '2023/10/05 01:41'

for field in record["DbInfo"]["FieldList"]:
    print("%(Name)s, %(FullName)s, %(Description)s" % field)

# 或
for field in record["DbInfo"]["FieldList"]:
    print(f"{field['Name']}, {field['FullName']}, {field['Description']}")
# ALL, All Fields, All terms from all searchable fields
# UID, UID, Unique number assigned to publication
# FILT, Filter, Limits the records
# TITL, Title, Words in title of publication
# MESH, MeSH Terms, Medical Subject Headings assigned to publication
# MAJR, MeSH Major Topic, MeSH terms of major importance to publication
# JOUR, Journal, Journal abbreviation of publication
# AFFL, Affiliation, Author's institutional affiliation and address
# ECNO, EC/RN Number, EC number for enzyme or CAS registry number
# SUBS, Supplementary Concept, CAS chemical name or MEDLINE Substance Name
# PDAT, Date - Publication, Date of publication
# EDAT, Date - Entry, Date publication first accessible through Entrez
# VOL, Volume, Volume number of publication
# PAGE, Pagination, Page number(s) of publication
# PTYP, Publication Type, Type of publication (e.g., review)
# LANG, Language, Language of publication
# ISS, Issue, Issue number of publication
# SUBH, MeSH Subheading, Additional specificity for MeSH term
# SI, Secondary Source ID, Cross-reference from publication to other databases
# MHDA, Date - MeSH, Date publication was indexed with MeSH terms
# TIAB, Title/Abstract, Free text associated with Abstract/Title
# OTRM, Other Term, Other terms associated with publication
# COLN, Author - Corporate, Corporate Author of publication
# CNTY, Place of Publication, Country of publication
# PAPX, Pharmacological Action, MeSH pharmacological action pre-explosions
# GRNT, Grants and Funding, NIH Grant Numbers
# MDAT, Date - Modification, Date of last modification
# CDAT, Date - Completion, Date of completion
# PID, Publisher ID, Publisher ID
# FAUT, Author - First, First Author of publication
# FULL, Author, Full Author Name(s) of publication
# FINV, Investigator, Full name of investigator
# TT, Transliterated Title, Words in transliterated title of publication
# LAUT, Author - Last, Last Author of publication
# PPDT, Print Publication Date, Date of print publication
# EPDT, Electronic Publication Date, Date of Electronic publication
# LID, Location ID, ELocation ID
# CRDT, Date - Create, Date publication first accessible through Entrez
# BOOK, Book, ID of the book that contains the document
# ED, Editor, Section's Editor
# ISBN, ISBN, ISBN
# PUBN, Publisher, Publisher's name
# AUCL, Author Cluster ID, Author Cluster ID
# EID, Extended PMID, Extended PMID
# DSO, DSO, Additional text from the summary
# AUID, Author - Identifier, Author Identifier
# PS, Subject - Personal Name, Personal Name as Subject
# COIS, Conflict of Interest Statements, Conflict of Interest Statements
# WORD, Text Word, Free text associated with publication
# P1DAT, P1DAT, Date publication first accessible through Solr

Entrez.esearch
...

from Bio import Entrez
Entrez.email = "xujialiuphd@gmail.com"
Entrez.api_key = "c7fd5c74cfe7e674bf3f78b94af0fb1fa909"
handle = Entrez.esearch(db="pubmed", term="biopython[title]", retmax=40)
record = Entrez.read(handle)
print(record["IdList"])
# ['34434786', '22909249', '19304878']

idtype参数默认为GI/GenInfo Identifier, 如果指定为acc, 返回为accession number/RefSeq ID

handle = Entrez.esearch(
    db="nucleotide", term="Cypripedioideae[Orgn] AND matK[Gene]", idtype="acc"
)
record = Entrez.read(handle)
record["Count"]
# '836'
record["IdList"]
# ['JQ660909.1', 'JQ660908.1', 'JQ660907.1', 'JQ660906.1', ..., 'JQ660890.1']
len(record["IdList"])   # 默认情况下, 只返回前20条记录
# 20

handle = Entrez.esearch(
    db="nucleotide", term="Cypripedioideae[Orgn] AND matK[Gene]", idtype="acc", retmax=1000
)
record = Entrez.read(handle)
record['Count']
# '836'
len(record["IdList"])
# 836

Entrez.epost()函数
...

9.16有后续的how to use the history feature.

from Bio import Entrez
Entrez.email = "xujialiuphd@gmail.com"
Entrez.api_key = "c7fd5c74cfe7e674bf3f78b94af0fb1fa909"
id_list = ["19304878", "18606172", "16403221", "16377612", "14871861", "14630660"]
search_results = Entrez.read(Entrez.epost("pubmed", id=",".join(id_list)))
search_results
# {'QueryKey': '1', 'WebEnv': 'MCID_651eb8ec9981425893121f9e'}

webenv = search_results["WebEnv"]
query_key = search_results["QueryKey"]

Entrez.efetch()函数
...

from Bio import Entrez
Entrez.email = "xujialiuphd@gmail.com"
Entrez.api_key = "c7fd5c74cfe7e674bf3f78b94af0fb1fa909"

# 如果要打印文本, retmode设置为text
handle = Entrez.efetch(db="nucleotide", id="EU490707", rettype="gb", retmode="text")
print(handle.read())
# LOCUS       EU490707                1302 bp    DNA     linear   PLN 26-JUL-2016
# DEFINITION  Selenipedium aequinoctiale maturase K (matK) gene, partial cds;
            # chloroplast.
# ACCESSION   EU490707
# VERSION     EU490707.1
# KEYWORDS    .
# SOURCE      chloroplast Selenipedium aequinoctiale
  # ORGANISM  Selenipedium aequinoctiale
            # Eukaryota; Viridiplantae; Streptophyta; Embryophyta; Tracheophyta;
            # Spermatophyta; Magnoliopsida; Liliopsida; Asparagales; Orchidaceae;
            # Cypripedioideae; Selenipedium.
# REFERENCE   1  (bases 1 to 1302)
  # AUTHORS   Neubig,K.M., Whitten,W.M., Carlsward,B.S., Blanco,M.A., Endara,L.,
            # Williams,N.H. and Moore,M.
  # TITLE     Phylogenetic utility of ycf1 in orchids: a plastid gene more
            # variable than matK
  # JOURNAL   Plant Syst. Evol. 277 (1-2), 75-84 (2009)
# REFERENCE   2  (bases 1 to 1302)
  # AUTHORS   Neubig,K.M., Whitten,W.M., Carlsward,B.S., Blanco,M.A.,
            # Endara,C.L., Williams,N.H. and Moore,M.J.
  # TITLE     Direct Submission
  # JOURNAL   Submitted (14-FEB-2008) Department of Botany, University of
            # Florida, 220 Bartram Hall, Gainesville, FL 32611-8526, USA
# FEATURES             Location/Qualifiers
     # source          1..1302
                     # /organism="Selenipedium aequinoctiale"
                     # /organelle="plastid:chloroplast"
                     # /mol_type="genomic DNA"
                     # /specimen_voucher="FLAS:Blanco 2475"
                     # /db_xref="taxon:256374"
     # gene            <1..>1302
                     # /gene="matK"
     # CDS             <1..>1302
                     # /gene="matK"
                     # /codon_start=1
                     # /transl_table=11
                     # /product="maturase K"
                     # /protein_id="ACC99456.1"
                     # /translation="IFYEPVEIFGYDNKSSLVLVKRLITRMYQQNFLISSVNDSNQKG
                     # FWGHKHFFSSHFSSQMVSEGFGVILEIPFSSQLVSSLEEKKIPKYQNLRSIHSIFPFL
                     # EDKFLHLNYVSDLLIPHPIHLEILVQILQCRIKDVPSLHLLRLLFHEYHNLNSLITSK
                     # KFIYAFSKRKKRFLWLLYNSYVYECEYLFQFLRKQSSYLRSTSSGVFLERTHLYVKIE
                     # HLLVVCCNSFQRILCFLKDPFMHYVRYQGKAILASKGTLILMKKWKFHLVNFWQSYFH
                     # FWSQPYRIHIKQLSNYSFSFLGYFSSVLENHLVVRNQMLENSFIINLLTKKFDTIAPV
                     # ISLIGSLSKAQFCTVLGHPISKPIWTDFSDSDILDRFCRICRNLCRYHSGSSKKQVLY
                     # RIKYILRLSCARTLARKHKSTVRTFMRRLGSGLLEEFFMEEE"
# ORIGIN      
        # 1 attttttacg aacctgtgga aatttttggt tatgacaata aatctagttt agtacttgtg
       # 61 aaacgtttaa ttactcgaat gtatcaacag aattttttga tttcttcggt taatgattct
      # 121 aaccaaaaag gattttgggg gcacaagcat tttttttctt ctcatttttc ttctcaaatg
      # 181 gtatcagaag gttttggagt cattctggaa attccattct cgtcgcaatt agtatcttct
      # 241 cttgaagaaa aaaaaatacc aaaatatcag aatttacgat ctattcattc aatatttccc
      # 301 tttttagaag acaaattttt acatttgaat tatgtgtcag atctactaat accccatccc
      # 361 atccatctgg aaatcttggt tcaaatcctt caatgccgga tcaaggatgt tccttctttg
      # 421 catttattgc gattgctttt ccacgaatat cataatttga atagtctcat tacttcaaag
      # 481 aaattcattt acgccttttc aaaaagaaag aaaagattcc tttggttact atataattct
      # 541 tatgtatatg aatgcgaata tctattccag tttcttcgta aacagtcttc ttatttacga
      # 601 tcaacatctt ctggagtctt tcttgagcga acacatttat atgtaaaaat agaacatctt
      # 661 ctagtagtgt gttgtaattc ttttcagagg atcctatgct ttctcaagga tcctttcatg
      # 721 cattatgttc gatatcaagg aaaagcaatt ctggcttcaa agggaactct tattctgatg
      # 781 aagaaatgga aatttcatct tgtgaatttt tggcaatctt attttcactt ttggtctcaa
      # 841 ccgtatagga ttcatataaa gcaattatcc aactattcct tctcttttct ggggtatttt
      # 901 tcaagtgtac tagaaaatca tttggtagta agaaatcaaa tgctagagaa ttcatttata
      # 961 ataaatcttc tgactaagaa attcgatacc atagccccag ttatttctct tattggatca
     # 1021 ttgtcgaaag ctcaattttg tactgtattg ggtcatccta ttagtaaacc gatctggacc
     # 1081 gatttctcgg attctgatat tcttgatcga ttttgccgga tatgtagaaa tctttgtcgt
     # 1141 tatcacagcg gatcctcaaa aaaacaggtt ttgtatcgta taaaatatat acttcgactt
     # 1201 tcgtgtgcta gaactttggc acggaaacat aaaagtacag tacgcacttt tatgcgaaga
     # 1261 ttaggttcgg gattattaga agaattcttt atggaagaag aa
# //

# 如果要用Entrez.read对handle进行parse, retmode设置为xml
handle = Entrez.efetch(db="nucleotide", id="EU490707", retmode="xml")
record = Entrez.read(handle)
handle.close()
record[0]["GBSeq_definition"]
# 'Selenipedium aequinoctiale maturase K (matK) gene, partial cds; chloroplast'
record[0]["GBSeq_source"]
# 'chloroplast Selenipedium aequinoctiale'

Entrez.eLink

from Bio import Entrez
Entrez.email = "xujialiuphd@gmail.com"
Entrez.api_key = "c7fd5c74cfe7e674bf3f78b94af0fb1fa909"
pmid = "19304878"
record = Entrez.read(Entrez.elink(dbfrom="pubmed", id=pmid))

from Bio import Entrez
Entrez.email = "xujialiuphd@gmail.com"
Entrez.api_key = "c7fd5c74cfe7e674bf3f78b94af0fb1fa909"
handle = Entrez.egquery(term="biopython")
record = Entrez.read(handle)
for row in record["eGQueryResult"]:
    print(row["DbName"], row["Count"])
# pubmed 44
# pmc 3085
# mesh 0
# books 2
# pubmedhealth Error
# omim 0
# ncbisearch 1
# nuccore 3           # Nucleotide Core
# nucgss 0            # Nucleotide Genome Survey Sequence
# nucest 0            # Nucleotide Expressed Sequence Tags
# protein 0
# genome 0
# structure 0
# taxonomy 0
# snp 0
# dbvar 0
# gene 0
# sra 2234
# biosystems Error
# unigene 0
# cdd 0
# clone 0
# popset 0
# geoprofiles 0
# gds 17              # GEO dataset
# homologene 0
# pccompound 0
# pcsubstance 0
# pcassay 0
# nlmcatalog 0
# probe 0
# gap 0
# proteinclusters 0
# bioproject 1
# biosample 0
# biocollections 0

handle = Entrez.egquery(term="Cypripedioideae")
record = Entrez.read(handle)
for row in record["eGQueryResult"]:
    if row["DbName"] == "nuccore":
        print(row["Count"])
